creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text: I'm experimenting with dropping TLS1.2 support on my servers, that's likely the cause of errors on 11.x with its ancient openssl. For now TLS1.2 is back on, but it'll be permanently dropped in august. Anyway I'm not even sure why I'm hosting this garbage, feel free to remove by mirror from MASTER_SITES.
